## Product Goal

What player-facing hotel work or fear moment improves?

## Core Action

- [ ] Answer phone
- [ ] Watch security cameras
- [ ] Check request/incident
- [ ] Go to location
- [ ] Open/refuse door
- [ ] Admit/refuse guest
- [ ] Patrol floor
- [ ] Hide/close/flee
- [ ] Record/report

- Screenshot/video/log path:
